samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output for the product. Algorithm: Shift-and-add multiplication Input: A (multiplicand) and B (multiplier) Output: product (A * B) Accumulates the product of A and B.

Initialize the product to zero.

Iterate through each bit of the multiplier (B):

if the current bit is 1, add the multiplicand (A) to the product.

Shift the multiplicand (A) left by one position.

Increment the counter.

Repeat until all bits of the multiplier are processed.
